title: CAM Assist Review Decision Record Schema
description: Defines a human review decision record for a staged CAM Assist strategy package. This record does not authorize machine execution.

record_version.description: Semantic version of the record format

package_path.description: Path to the reviewed package directory

operation_type.description: Type of lutherie operation from the package manifest

decision.description: Human review decision. 'approve_for_downstream_cam' does NOT authorize machine execution.

reviewer.description: Name or identifier of the human reviewer

reviewed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the review decision

authority.description: Authority declarations for this decision record

does_not_authorize_machine_execution.description: MUST be true. This decision does not authorize machine execution.

requires_downstream_cam_verification.description: MUST be true. Downstream CAM verification is still required.

human_review_recorded.description: MUST be true. Human review has been recorded.
